name: momentum-onboarding
description: Trafft booking -> XPM onboarding (dedup) + client portal: passwordless login, membership tiers (Stripe), secure document exchange (S3), and templated follow-up forms

scripts.migrate: psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f src/db/schema.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f src/db/service-template-schema.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f src/portal/portal-schema.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f src/portal/docs-forms-schema.sql && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f src/portal/staff-auth-schema.sql
